case_title: BENSON, MICHELLE et al vs. DESTORIES, KATHY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENSON, MICHELLE BENSON, ANGELIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT DESTORIES, KATHY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          NOV-27-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-25-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-07-1995

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-04-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-04-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), SECOND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR TODAY, $50 SANCTIONS IMPOSED BY COURT TO PLAINTIFF, PAYABLE BY 1/24/96 AND IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO APPEAR ON 2/6/96, AND NO GOOD CAUSE COURT WILL DISMISS CASE.
